feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Apps
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Apps Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to validate the signup process with data variable
entry.content:
I have login form with 3 values as(page variable) which i need to get check with the data.Users_list(data variable) if username, password, usertype get matched user should get login

pageVars.u_username === data.Users_list[0].fields.username && pageVars.u_pass === data.Users_list[0].fields.password && pageVars.u_type === data.Users_list[0].fields.user_type

@Dan_Wroblewski 
@merituulimelkko

@SAPSupport

entry.title: Creation of another project in SAP Build
entry.content: I am unable to create another project in SAP Build. Quick response to this is highly appreciated.

entry.title: SAP Mobile Start fails to load App
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have created a site on Workzone where I have associated an app developed with SAP Build. If I open the site from the browser, I can access the app without any problems. However, if I access it via Mobile Start, I see the application tile, but when I click on it, I get the following error: "unable to load external app" on iOS, "unable to open app" on Android.

The application was developed using a trial account.

Below are all the steps I followed for the configuration:

  • Built and deployed the app in "SAP Build Apps | Build Service" for Work Zone
  • Added the app to Work Zone
  • Enabled the site setting for Mobile Start
  • Tested the app in the web launchpad and it works correctly
  • Downloaded Mobile Start on iOS and Android
  • Performed BTP authentication
  • Successfully connected to the launchpad
  • Viewed group and app
  • Clicking on the app, the error "unable to load external app" appears on iOS and "unable to open app" on Android

Do you have any idea what the problem might be?

Thank you all.

entry.title: Unable to find my deployed Processes and triggers in the manage section
entry.content:
Hi 
I am unable to find my deployed processes and triggers in the manage section of the SAP build lobby. I am currently referring to the Step 3 (Run Business process) of the mission in SAP Build apps. Kindly help me with the same. Attaching the screenshot here from the tutorial as well as my own screen.

This is my screen.

This is the tutorial screen.

Kindly help me with this issue. earlier response to this will be highly appreciated.
Thanks

entry.title: SAP BUILD APP: Error in the build(iOS)
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to deploy from SAP Build Apps|Free Edition an application and the system generates an error:

AB version: 3.5.0
COMMAND: 

USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true  npxrnv repackage-ios -p ios -s standalone_adhoc -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-120773\"" --offline --templates-path /Users/iosbuilder/templates --keychain-path /Users/iosbuilder/Library/Keychains/AppGyver-120773-db --provisioning-profile-path /Users/iosbuilder/current/certs/bs_secrets_120773_a4a2eb08-224c-4c6f-a9dc-89cd6810084d.mobileprovision --signing-identity "iPhone Distribution:" 

FAILED with ERROR: 

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv repackage-ios -p ios -s standalone_adhoc -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-120773\"" --offline --templates-path /Users/iosbuilder/templates --keychain-path /Users/iosbuilder/Library/Keychains/AppGyver-120773-db --provisioning-profile-path /Users/iosbuilder/current/certs/bs_secrets_120773_a4a2eb08-224c-4c6f-a9dc-89cd6810084d.mobileprovision --signing-identity "iPhone Distribution"

 

The p12 certificate and mobileprovision are correct.
Can you help me solve the error?

Thank you

entry.title: EACCPS error Permission Denied Error while using Read file flow function
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using" Read file " flow function in the build app to read a text file from android device. While running the app in preview using SAP build apps its showing error "EACCPS error Permission Denied" please refer attached screenshot. Any help will be appreciated. I checked build app permissions and this app is not asking for storage access permissions. I have  provided all other permissions.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Returning a List of Document Templates (using Document Information Extraction)
entry.content:
Hello Experts, I am working on automation, I would like to know how to pass a list of Document Templates to the Extract Data (Template) artifact? Because I want to set up a dynamic way in the event that new Document Templates are added.

Please see below for a screenshot of how I am currently using the Extract Data artifact.

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: SAP BUILD APP: Error in the build(Deploy)
entry.content:
Hello,

I have my app created in SAP Build APP Edition Free and I cannot generate any version, neither in ipa nor in apk, when other times I had generated them without problems.

It doesn't allow me to use any version other than 4.12.166.

Is anyone in the same situation?

Do you know how to solve it?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Extracting Line Items from the a Document Template
entry.content:
Happy Monday Experts. I am working on an automation that will auto-approve invoices using a document template. I have create a 'skeleton' so to say. My current setup extracts fields at a Header field. But I need assistance with extracting field at a line item level. Basically I need a clarity on the approach, because various invoices have varying numbers of line items.

Therefore, I would to know if I show create line for the empty fields, that way it would return details should that space been populate and return blank if the fields are empty.

SAP Business Technology Platform #SAP Build Process Automation SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation

entry.title: List Creation, Population and Retrieval
entry.content:
Dear Maestros, I have created a List variable, but I am only able to Set Variable Value for the 0th element and only retrieve the 0th element, because my 'Set Variable Value' method only allows input of myVariable[0]. I would like to ask what I may be doing incorrect? 

SAP Business Technology Platform SAP Build Apps SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: [URGENT] All My Inbox apps in SAP BTP Build Work Zone are Crashing in 2025
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

All your Build workzone My Inbox apps are crashing in Build workzone, please help.

entry.title: SAP Build Publishing Public Link
entry.content:
Greetings,

I deployed an app in SAP Build and found the link under "HTML5 Applications." However, the link is not publicly accessible—it requires company credentials for access.

Can someone guide me on how to remove this restriction and make the link publicly accessible without requiring any specific credentials?

entry.title: issue with java script action in Build apps
entry.content:
Hi all, 
i'm sending image to SAP Documentation information extraction service and Getting the extraction Payload as in the Code below. also specified the code i'm using to filter the payload to get the desired output.
Desired Output : 

 

 

{ 
  deliveryNote: '2006452328',
  lineItems: [
    { 
       Material: '121G0612',
       OrderQty: '2',
       Unit: 'PC',
       CustomerOrderNo: null
     }
  ]
}

 

function extractLineItemValues(input) {
    const output = {
        deliveryNote: null,
        lineItems: [],
    };
 
    // Extract Delivery Note details
    if (input.extraction && input.extraction.headerFields) {
        const deliveryNoteField = input.extraction.headerFields.find(
            (field) => field.name === "Delivery.Note.no"
        );
 
        if (deliveryNoteField) {
            output.deliveryNote = deliveryNoteField.value || null;
        }
    }
 
    // Extract Line Item details
    if (input.extraction && input.extraction.lineItems) {
        input.extraction.lineItems.forEach((lineItem, index) => {
            const lineItemDetails = {
                // lineItemIndex: index + 1,
                Material: null,
                OrderQty: null,
                Unit: null,
                CustomerOrderNo: null,
            };
 
            lineItem.forEach((field) => {
                if (field.name === "Material.Number") {
                    lineItemDetails.Material = field.value;
                } else if (field.name === "Order.Qty") {
                    lineItemDetails.OrderQty = field.value;
                } else if (field.name === "Unit") {
                    lineItemDetails.Unit = field.value;
                } else if (field.name === "Customer.Order.No") {
                    lineItemDetails.CustomerOrderNo = field.value;
                }
            });
 
            output.lineItems.push(lineItemDetails);
        });
    }
 
    return output;
}
 const input = 
   {
    "status": "DONE",
    "id": "bc4a788f-f484-41c6-9080-b542af6eceac",
    "fileName": "20240229_002955623_iOS.jpg",
    "documentType": "custom",
    "created": "2025-01-22T11:35:20.521251+00:00",
    "finished": "2025-01-22T11:35:27.302215+00:00",
    "clientId": "default",
    "languageCodes": [
        "en"
    ],
    "pageCount": 1,
    "schemaId": "8a708f91-c059-4668-b32e-6a983617a479",
    "schemaVersion": "1",
    "schemaName": "Danfoss",
    "width": 2213,
    "height": 2951,
    "country": null,
    "bocrVersion": "2.38.0",
    "doxVersion": "1.105.2",
    "fileType": "jpeg",
    "dataForRetrainingStatus": "notUsedForTraining",
    "extraction": {
        "headerFields": [
            {
                "name": "Delivery.Note.no",
                "category": "custom",
                "value": "2006452328",
                "rawValue": "2006452328",
                "type": "string",
                "page": 1,
                "confidence": 0.7454677150958504,
                "coordinates": {
                    "x": 0.21554450971531858,
                    "y": 0.34700101660454086,
                    "w": 0.09489380930863084,
                    "h": 0.0155879362927821
                },
                "model": "ai",
                "label": "Delivery.Note.no",
                "description": "\t\nDelivery Note Number"
            },
            {
                "name": "Cust.order.no",
                "category": "custom",
                "value": "4508421585",
                "rawValue": "4508421585",
                "type": "string",
                "page": 1,
                "confidence": 0.7423638309141645,
                "coordinates": {
                    "x": 0.49796656122910077,
                    "y": 0.41782446628261605,
                    "w": 0.0655219159511975,
                    "h": 0.010504913588614051
                },
                "model": "ai",
                "label": "Cust.order.no",
                "description": "Customer Order Number"
            }
        ],
        "lineItems": [
            [
                {
                    "name": "Material.Number",
                    "category": "custom",
                    "value": "121G0612",
                    "rawValue": "121G0612",
                    "type": "string",
                    "page": 1,
                    "confidence": 0.7516425639717169,
                    "coordinates": {
                        "x": 0.22413014008133755,
                        "y": 0.7095899695018638,
                        "w": 0.07681879801174876,
                        "h": 0.0155879362927821
                    },
                    "model": "ai",
                    "label": "Material.Number",
                    "description": "Material Number"
                },
                {
                    "name": "Order.Qty",
                    "category": "custom",
                    "value": "2",
                    "rawValue": "2",
                    "type": "string",
                    "page": 1,
                    "confidence": 0.7661332977672575,
                    "coordinates": {
                        "x": 0.1482150926344329,
                        "y": 0.7109454422229753,
                        "w": 0.007681879801174879,
                        "h": 0.014910199932226309
                    },
                    "model": "ai",
                    "label": "Order.Qty",
                    "description": "Order Quantity"
                },
                {
                    "name": "Unit",
                    "category": "custom",
                    "value": "PC",
                    "rawValue": "PC",
                    "type": "string",
                    "page": 1,
                    "confidence": 0.7803107131481841,
                    "coordinates": {
                        "x": 0.1789426118391324,
                        "y": 0.7106065740426973,
                        "w": 0.023497514685946685,
                        "h": 0.01491019993222642
                    },
                    "model": "ai",
                    "label": "Unit",
                    "description": "Unit of Measure"
                }
            ]
        ]
    }
}
 
// Example usa
const formattedOutput = extractLineItemValues(input);
// irpa_core.cor.log("")
console.log(formattedOutput);

  The issue is , its working in the VSCODE and GB Compiler , but its not working in the JS workflow action Component in SAP Build apps
@Dan_Wroblewski  @DonWilliams @Sandra_Rossi @Ulrich_Schmidt 
Many thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Getting BTP Authentication Error on deployed Application
entry.content:
After the build is completed successfully, the application displays the error "SAP BTP Authentication failed for an unknown reason" when it is installed and opened.

 

@Dan_Wroblewski 
@merituulimelkko
@dennis_koehler 
@MarcHuber

entry.title: How to hide the page Tab in Build apps Preview page
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

I want to hide few tabs to the User, only admin can see the all tabs. The rest user only see PER and approver Requests pages.
Where can i find the option to change the visibility of User to the Page tabs.

entry.title: how to manage user authentication in sap build code?
entry.content:
I am working on SAP Build Code and need some clarification regarding user authentication and role-based access control. Specifically, I have the following two questions:

  1. Is it possible to restrict access to specific columns in a table based on user roles? For example, if I have a "salaries" column, can I make it so that only users with a "Manager" role can see this column, while users with a "Viewer" role cannot?

  2. Regarding action buttons, if a user has a "Read Only" role, I understand that they will receive a "Forbidden" message when attempting actions like delete or create. Is there a way to dynamically hide these action buttons (e.g., "Delete" or "Create") for users with "Read Only" access, so they don't even appear on the UI?

Looking forward to your insights.

entry.title: Build Apps - Add Integration - BTP Destinations - Fetching services for catalog failed error
entry.content:
Hello,

I have set up the SAP cloud connector configuration and added Destination in my BTP trial account. Both the connections were successful. When I goto Build apps  and try to Add Integration - BTP destinations, I'm getting below error.

Fetching services for catalog XXX failed:Request failed with status code 400  (XXX - Destination name)

What could be missing here.

Regards,

Gautham.

entry.title: how to send the PDF file in HTTP Destination request POST method ?
entry.content:
HI

I am trying create HTTP POST request containing PDF file content which will be used for Document Inforamtion Extraction

Component "PICK FILE" being used to upload the PDF file, now i want to pass the file data to the HTTP Destination Request 

the Output of PICK FILE look like this 

I tried to pass PDF data to form-data of HTTP request body like this

But i am getting following Error "No file was uploaded for processing"

Please suggest me how to fix this error

entry.title: Using SAP Migrate to Modify or Upload Data in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Can SAP Migrate be utilized to modify or upload data directly into an SAP Build App?

If yes, I would appreciate guidance on:

  1. The process or steps required to integrate SAP Migrate with SAP Build Apps for data upload or modification.
  2. Supported data formats and any prerequisites for this integration.
  3. Any limitations or considerations when using SAP Migrate with SAP Build Apps.

If no, are there alternative tools or methods within the SAP ecosystem for handling such tasks effectively?

Thank you in advance for your insights and recommendations!

entry.title: Creating Roles and Managing Authorizations in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
I am working on SAP Build Apps and need some assistance with managing roles and authorizations effectively. Specifically, I have the following queries:

  1. How can I create a role with specific objects or actions in SAP Build Apps? For example, if I want to grant access to certain features or functionalities, what is the best approach to define such roles?

  2. What is the recommended way to configure and manage authorizations for these roles to ensure that users only access the features assigned to them?

  3. Are there specific tools or configurations in SAP Build or SAP BTP that I should use to streamline the process?

Any guidance, best practices, or relevant documentation links would be highly appreciated.

Looking forward to your support.
